nodes.label: Indirect: Read pointer then read operand

visuals.title: Addressing Modes
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Addressing Modes</text>
  
  <!-- Immediate -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Immediate
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Direct -->
  <rect x="50" y="120" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Direct
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Indirect -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Indirect
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Register -->
  <rect x="50" y="240" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Register
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Memory Unit -->
  <rect x="250" y="120" width="120" height="120" fill="#64B5F6" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Memory
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- CPU -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="8" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    CPU
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows -->
  <line x1="170" y1="80" x2="250" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="140" x2="250" y2="140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="200" x2="250" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="170" y1="260" x2="250" y2="260" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
